modelIdentification.name: JLVC-ACS
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-ACS provides ACS components neccessary for use in the JLVC federation.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the additional object attributes and interactions necessary for ACS communication.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2024 - Draft 1 of the JLVC Modular FOM.
JLVC2024 - Updated version number from 2024 to 1.
JLVC2024 - Version 2: Updated the name of AggregateCombatAdjudicationTypeEnum8 enumerator value 1 to be "Disused".
JLVC2024 - Version 3: Updated CombatSetStruct.Key to use dataType UUID.
JLVC2025 - Version 4: Updated AggregateCombatStatusEnum8 value 24 to be CombatSetTerminationAlreadyInProgress.
JLVC2025 - Version 5: Updated semantics for FederateState object to match the semantics change in JLVC-Base from JLVC2025 Draft 2.
JLVC2026 - Version 6: Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names. Added RPR Enumerations module as a reference dependency.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Physical FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module

objectClass.name: JLVC_GroundVehicle
objectClass.semantics: GroundVehicle published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: BehindCover
attribute.semantics: Optional. Indicates whether an entity is behind cover (shielded from fire), behind partial cover (partially shielded from fire) or exposed. State defaults to "Not Behind Cover" until value is sent.

objectClass.name: JLVC_Human
objectClass.semantics: Human published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: BehindCover
attribute.semantics: Optional. Indicates whether an entity is behind cover (shielded from fire), behind partial cover (partially shielded from fire) or exposed. State defaults to "Not Behind Cover" until value is sent.

objectClass.name: JLVC_NonHuman
objectClass.semantics: NonHuman published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: BehindCover
attribute.semantics: Optional. Indicates whether an entity is behind cover (shielded from fire), behind partial cover (partially shielded from fire) or exposed. State defaults to "Not Behind Cover" until value is sent.

objectClass.name: FederateState
objectClass.semantics: Provides federate state information. While much of the information provided is static, attributes that do change shall update every 60 seconds. Additionally, some attributes shall update immediately upon change, as described in the attribute's semantics.

attribute.name: AggregateCombat
attribute.semantics: Optional. Present for ground models participating in aggregate combat using ACS.

objectClass.name: AggregateCombatState
objectClass.semantics: Provides state data from the Aggregate Combat Service to the federation.

attribute.name: IsEngineRunning
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the Aggregate Combat Engine is running and adjudicating combat.

attribute.name: ActiveCombatSets
attribute.semantics: List of combat sets current active

interactionClass.name: InitiateAggregateCombat
interactionClass.semantics: Initiates unit (aggregate) combat with another unit.

parameter.name: Initiator
parameter.semantics: Unit that is initiating the ground engagement with another unit.

parameter.name: Target
parameter.semantics: Unit being engaged by another unit in aggregate ground combat.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifier generated by the issuing federate used to link all ACS interactions associated with this (one-way) combat set (initiator → target). RTIObjectId set to the sending simulation and the EventCount is a unique value to this specific engagement.

parameter.name: MethodOfEngagement
parameter.semantics: Indicates the allocation of forces used by the initiating simulation.

parameter.name: PriorityOfEngagement
parameter.semantics: Optional. Provides a method for prioritizing categories of platforms for targeting purposes. Multiple categories assigned to an identical priority is allowed. Categories assigned a priority of 0 will not be engaged. Categories not listed will receive the default priority (below all listed priorities but still engageable).

parameter.name: MunitionUsage
parameter.semantics: Determines whether munition (supply) availability will limit combat engagements.

parameter.name: MunitionAllocation
parameter.semantics: Supply (munition) information.

interactionClass.name: TerminateAggregateCombat
interactionClass.semantics: Terminates unit (aggregate) combat with another unit.

parameter.name: Initiator
parameter.semantics: Unit that is terminating the engagement.

parameter.name: Target
parameter.semantics: Unit targeted by the Initiator.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Set to the EventIdentifier (from the InitiateAggregateCombat interaction) associated with the combat set that this interaction is terminating.

interactionClass.name: AggregateCombatReport
interactionClass.semantics: Reports on the results of aggregate combat.

parameter.name: Initiator
parameter.semantics: Unit that initiated the ground combat engagement.

parameter.name: Target
parameter.semantics: Unit targeted by the Initiator.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Set to the EventIdentifier (from the InitiateAggregateCombat interaction) associated with the combat set for which this interaction is providing results.

parameter.name: AttritionList
parameter.semantics: List of entities receiving damage in the engagement.

parameter.name: ExpendedMunitionList
parameter.semantics: List of munitions expended, either by entity or by unit. Note: The variant record used must match the AggregateCombatMunitionAllocationType used in the InitiateAggregateCombat interaction MunitionAllocation parameter.

parameter.name: EngagementStatus
parameter.semantics: Provides feedback to the Initiator of the engagement about the success or failure of their forces engaging target systems, with some indications as to why they may not be able to fire and generate effects

interactionClass.name: MunitionUpdate
interactionClass.semantics: Passes updated munition (supply) information, typically after resupply operations have affected the unit in combat. Models should pass supply count changes, not totals, in this interaction. Only changes originating from outside of aggregate combat should be included (i.e. do not include consumption information provided by ACS).

parameter.name: Initiator
parameter.semantics: Unit that initiated the ground combat engagement.

parameter.name: Target
parameter.semantics: Unit targeted by the Initiator.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Set to the EventIdentifier (from the InitiateAggregateCombat interaction) associated with the combat set for which this interaction is providing munition updates.

parameter.name: MunitionAllocation
parameter.semantics: Supply (munition) information. Note: The variant record used must match the AggregateCombatMunitionAllocationType used in the InitiateAggregateCombat interaction MunitionAllocation parameter.

interactionClass.name: AggregateCombatStatus
interactionClass.semantics: Provides a response to a ground model request (via InitiateAggregateCombat, MunitionUpdate, or TerminateAggregateCombat interactions) or a notification that some event has triggered a change in an existing combat set.

parameter.name: Initiator
parameter.semantics: Unit that initiated the ground combat engagement.

parameter.name: Target
parameter.semantics: Unit targeted by the Initiator.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Set to the EventIdentifier (from the InitiateAggregateCombat interaction) associated with the combat set that this interaction is reporting a status on.

parameter.name: Trigger
parameter.semantics: What interaction or event triggered this report.

parameter.name: StatusList
parameter.semantics: Statuses being reported. At least one status is required.

parameter.name: Details
parameter.semantics: Optional. Used to communicate additional details.

enumeratedData.name: AggregateCombatEngagementStatusEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Indicates whether an Initiator is actively engaging a Target in an ACS combat set or, if not, why not.

enumeratedData.name: AggregateCombatMethodOfEngagementTypeEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Describes how aggregate forces will be allocated for this engagement.

enumeratedData.name: AggregateCombatMunitionAllocationEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Specifies the manner in which munitions will be provided.

enumeratedData.name: AggregateCombatMunitionUsageEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Determines whether munition expenditures will be tracked (only when available) or will limit combat if proper munitions aren’t available.

enumeratedData.name: AggregateCombatStatusEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Status being reported. 0 is success, all others values indicate a failure.

enumeratedData.name: BehindCoverEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Specifies whether the object is behind cover (i.e. shielded from fire). This can be a prepared defensive position, natural terrain features, or some kind of mobile shielding that augments the object's normal ability to resist/avoid fire.

enumeratedData.name: GroundPlatformCategoryEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Categories of ground platforms and lifeforms

arrayData.name: AggregateCombatStatusArray1Plus
arrayData.semantics: A list status codes. At least one is required.

arrayData.name: EntityAttritionStructArray
arrayData.semantics: A list of LVC IDs and damages.

arrayData.name: EntitySuppliesStructArray
arrayData.semantics: A list of entities and their supplies.

arrayData.name: PriorityOfEngagementStructArray
arrayData.semantics: A list of platform categories and their engagement priorities.

arrayData.name: SupplyQuantityStructArray
arrayData.semantics: A list of supplies and quantities.

arrayData.name: SystemCountStructArray
arrayData.semantics: A list of systems (enumerations) and counts.

fixedRecordData.name: AggregateCombatStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Model level settings for participating in aggregate combat.

field.name: State
field.semantics: Indicates whether a simulation participates in aggregate (ground) combat and what type of adjudication it uses.

field.name: IncludeInitiatorSubordinates
field.semantics: Whether to include subordinates (aggregates and systems) of the Initiator when processing an InitiateAggregateCombat from this federate.

field.name: IncludeTargetSubordinates
field.semantics: Whether to include subordinates (aggregates and systems) of the Target when processing an InitiateAggregateCombat from this federate.

fixedRecordData.name: CombatSetStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Contains the information associated with a single aggregate combat engagement.

field.name: Key
field.semantics: The UUID key of the combat set used by ACS to track this combat set.

field.name: Sender
field.semantics: RTI Object ID of the sender of the InitiateAggregateCombat interaction.

field.name: Initiator
field.semantics: LVC ID of the initiating aggregate.

field.name: Target
field.semantics: LVC ID of the target aggregate.

field.name: InitiatorFederate
field.semantics: Federate Identifier of the federate owning (publishing) the Initiator.

field.name: TargetFederate
field.semantics: Federate Identifier of the federate owning (publishing) the Target.

field.name: EventIdentifier
field.semantics: Event Identifier of the engagement.

field.name: WhenStarted
field.semantics: Time the engagement was started in ACS.

field.name: MethodOfEngagement
field.semantics: Method of engagement specified.

field.name: CustomPriorityOfEngagement
field.semantics: Was a Priority of Engagement provided?

field.name: MunitionAllocationMethod
field.semantics: Method by which munitions were allocated.

field.name: MunitionUsage
field.semantics: Method of munition usage being used.

field.name: Entity
field.semantics: Identity of the affected entity.

field.name: Result
field.semantics: Type of damage to the entity.

fixedRecordData.name: EntitySuppliesStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Contains the supplies associated with a single entity instance.

field.name: Entity
field.semantics: LVC ID of an entity.

field.name: Supplies
field.semantics: List of supplies.

fixedRecordData.name: PriorityOfEngagementStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Contains the Priority of Engagement designation for a category of equipment.

field.name: TargetCategory
field.semantics: Category of system or lifeform

field.name: Priority
field.semantics: Priority of this category. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. 0 is a special case and marks a category as do not target.

fixedRecordData.name: SupplyQuantityStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Type and quantity of a supply item.

field.name: Identifier
field.semantics: Identity (enumeration) of the supply item.

field.name: Available
field.semantics: Quantity of the item.

field.name: SystemType
field.semantics: Enumeration of the system

field.name: Count
field.semantics: Number of systems

variantRecordData.name: AggregateCombatMethodOfEngagementVariantStruct

alternative.name: UnitPercentage
alternative.semantics: Percentage of unit systems without regard to system type. Range: [0.0,100.0]. Specific entities determined by ACS.

alternative.name: SystemCounts
alternative.semantics: List of systems (enumerations) and count of each to participate. Specific entities determined by ACS.

alternative.name: EntityList
alternative.semantics: List of entities designated to participate.

alternative.name: Automatic
alternative.semantics: Unit participation is determine by ACS (100% unless engaged with multiple aggregates, then smart allocation).

variantRecordData.semantics: Portion of the unit (systems and personnel) to commit to an aggregate combat engagement.

variantRecordData.name: AggregateCombatMunitionsVariantStruct

alternative.name: MunitionsByUnit
alternative.semantics: List of supplies allocated to or expended by the unit.

alternative.name: MunitionsByEntity
alternative.semantics: List of supplies allocated to or expended by each entity.

alternative.name: NotProvided
alternative.semantics: Systems are assumed to have 100% of supplies normally associated with the system class and a default resupply rate for allocations. No supply information is provided when used to track expenditures.

variantRecordData.semantics: Method of allocating and tracking expended supplies (munitions) for combat forces.
